name: Milan Station Holdings Limited
summary: Milan Station Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the retail of handbags, fashion accessories, embellishments, and spa and wellness products in Hong Kong, Macau, and the People's Republic of China. The company operates retail shops under the Milan Station and France Station brands that offer unused and second-hand handbags, clothing, shoes, watches, and other accessories; and natural aroma and skin care products under the THANN brand. It also sells its products online. In addition, the company provides money lending services. Milan Station Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
